name: Direct Mail - MAC - Zip Level Performance

content.query:
SELECT
zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,zip.HouseholdsPerZipCode as [Total Households]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-08-01' and '2022-11-30' then NetSalesAmount else 0 end) as [3Mo Net Sales Amount]
,sum([NetSalesAmount]) as [Net Sales Amount]
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index] as [Overall RRI]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index] as [Baths RRI]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index] as [Windows RRI]
,sum([LeadCount]) as [Lead Count]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-09-01' and '2022-11-30' then LeadCount else 0 end) as [3Mo Lead Count]
,sum([ApptSet]) as [Appt Set]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-09-01' and '2022-11-30' then ApptSet else 0 end) as [3Mo Appt Set]
,sum([NetSold]) as [Net Sold]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-09-01' and '2022-11-30' then NetSold else 0 end) as [3Mo Net Sold]
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[State]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE] zipPerf
 inner join ODS.MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS zip
 on zipPerf.ZipCode = zip.ZipCode
left join ODS.MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX zonda
on zipPerf.ZipCode = zonda.ZipCode
where 
zipPerf.Division = 'MAC'
and zip.PrimaryRecord = 'P'
group by 
zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,zip.HouseholdsPerZipCode
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[State]
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
order by 
[Net Sales Amount] desc

/*
select distinct ZipCode, brn.LongName as Branch
from 
EDW.DIM_BRANCH_ZIP brz, EDW.DIM_BRANCH brn
where brz.Division = 'MAC'
and brz.BranchID = brn.BranchID
and brn.LongName not in ('Garage Systems Madison','Garage Systems Charlotte')
order by Branch, ZipCode


select distinct zip as ZipCode, brn.LongName as Branch
from 
[ODS].[LP_MAC_brz_BranchZips] brz, [ODS].[LP_MAC_brn_Branches] brn
where 
brz.brn_id = brn.id
order by Branch, ZipCode


select * from EDW.DIM_BRANCH where Division = 'MAC' order by BranchID
*/
